entities.name: Gmail
entities.context: Email service used to fetch sent emails for productivity tracking

entities.name: Productivity Dashboard
entities.context: Dashboard that tracks email productivity metrics including email count, word count, and RPI

entities.name: Word Counting Rules
entities.context: Methodology for counting original words while excluding quoted replies, signatures, and thread history

relationships.context: Gmail serves as the data source for the productivity dashboard
RPI is a key metric displayed on the productivity dashboard
Word counting rules determine the word count component of the RPI calculation
